name: Bhopali Roti
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Cumin seeds, dry roasted and ground
3 tbsp Cashews, broken and ground coarsely
6 Saffron strands, soaked in 2 tbsp Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together whole wheat flour, rice flour, and salt.
2. Rub in 2 tablespoons of ghee or oil into the dry ingredients.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (except oil for frying) to the mixture.
4. Add water slowly until a soft dough forms. Knead well until no longer sticky.
5. Divide the dough into 8 small balls.
6. On a floured surface, roll out each ball into a 6-inch round.
7. Heat a griddle and place the rolled-out dough on it.
8. Dry roast the roti until small brown specks appear on the underside.
9. Turn the roti over using a spatula.
10. Spread a little ghee or oil over the surface and drizzle 1 teaspoon of ghee or oil around the roti.
11. Cook until both sides are golden brown.
12. Repeat with the remaining dough.
